title: Ukraine Tries to Cut Off Crimea, Choking Russian Supply Routes
summary_full: Scores of targeted attacks against supply routes, part of what Kyiv calls a “logistics lockdown,” has caused gasoline shortages.
summary_public: Scores of targeted attacks against supply routes, part of what Kyiv calls a “logistics lockdown,” has caused gasoline shortages.
